channel.title: Frontion News - Global Geopolitics Headlines
channel.description: Real-time geopolitical news from global sources

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah strikes Iron Dome battery with FPV drone on northern border
item.description: Hezbollah released footage of a First-Person View drone striking an Iron Dome battery, highlighting the IDF struggle against FPV drones that use cables and manual operation to evade jamming technologies.

item.title: 🇮🇱 IDF and US ran covert rescue operations from Iraq during Iran war
item.description: Jerusalem Post confirms IDF special forces rescue units were stationed in Iraq to rescue downed pilots during the Iran war, with Brig-Gen R. calling the US-Israel air force cooperation historic and unprecedented.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea identifies aircraft that struck cargo ship in Hormuz
item.description: Seoul says two unidentified aircraft struck the HMM Namu cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz, causing fire and smoke. Iran denied responsibility for the attack.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine ramps up ground robot production to evacuate civilians and soldiers
item.description: Ukraine contracted 25,000 ground robots in first half of 2026, more than double last year. UGVs are now dual-use: hauling ammo, evacuating wounded, and rescuing civilians from contested zones like Lyman.

item.title: 🏛️ Pentagon launches Deal Team Six to reform defense acquisitions
item.description: Defense Secretary Hegseth created a team of private sector negotiators to fix Pentagon bureaucracy, aiming to eliminate double-dipping by contractors and speed up weapons production.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Proposal as "Surrender," Trump Calls Response "Totally Unacceptable"
item.description: Iran sent its response to the US peace proposal via Pakistani mediators, demanding war reparations, full sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz, and an end to sanctions. Trump rejected the response and accused Tehran of "playing games" for nearly 50 years.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran fires missiles at US-backed ship in Gulf of Oman
item.description: A US-backed vessel was targeted in the Gulf of Oman as regional tensions escalate following the breakdown of ceasefire talks.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Drone attacks reported across Gulf states amid ceasefire strain
item.description: Multiple Gulf nations reported drone attacks as the US-Iran ceasefire faces mounting pressure from regional escalations.

item.title: ⚽ Iran World Cup team faces uncertainty amid conflict
item.description: FIFA and national federations assess Iran's participation status in upcoming World Cup amid ongoing military conflict.

item.title: 🚢 Hantavirus cruise ship evacuation continues in Tenerife
item.description: Passengers from the MV Hondius continue evacuation in the Canary Islands as hantavirus concerns spread among cruise passengers.

item.title: 🛢️ Saudi Aramco profits surge despite Middle East conflict
item.description: Saudi Aramco reported increased profits even as regional conflict disrupts oil markets and shipping routes.

item.title: 📖 Nobel laureate's smuggled memoir details Iranian prison abuse
item.description: Narges Mohammadi's memoir, smuggled from prison, reveals beatings and medical neglect in Iranian detention facilities.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump to visit China for Xi summit amid Iran tensions
item.description: President Trump announced plans to visit China for talks with Xi Jinping, with Iran expected to be a key agenda item.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian defense minister resigns after drone airspace violations
item.description: Latvia's defense minister stepped down after Ukrainian drones diverted by Russian electronic warfare struck facilities inside Latvian territory.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea draws Gulf oil storage interest amid Hormuz crisis
item.description: South Korea's strategic oil storage facilities attract Gulf nations seeking alternative storage as Hormuz disruption continues.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK politics: Starmer faces leadership challenge
item.description: British PM Keir Starmer faces mounting pressure as potential leadership challengers position themselves.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia breaches three-day ceasefire with Ukraine, says Zelenskyy
item.description: Russia violated the Victory Day ceasefire despite Putin's declaration, continuing attacks that killed one and injured 19 across Ukraine.

item.title: 🏝️ British paratroopers land on Tristan da Cunha for hantavirus response
item.description: UK deployed paratroopers to remote Tristan da Cunha island after suspected hantavirus case aboard cruise ship.

item.title: 🌏 US-China summit to address Iran and trade tensions
item.description: Trump's upcoming China summit faces challenges including Taiwan, Iran conflict, and ongoing trade disputes.

item.title: 🏛️ UK politics: Starmer faces fight for survival
item.description: British Labour leader Keir Starmer faces 24 hours of peril as potential challengers prepare leadership bids.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran threatens US sites in Middle East if tankers targeted
item.description: Iranian officials warned of retaliation against US regional assets if Iranian tankers come under fire amid ongoing Hormuz standoff.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary's new PM apologizes for Orbán-era wrongs
item.description: Hungary's new prime minister delivered a historic apology for wrongs committed under Viktor Orbán's government.

item.title: 🇮🇷 US-Iran peace talks strain as drone strikes continue
item.description: Efforts to maintain ceasefire face challenges as regional drone attacks escalate and diplomatic tensions mount.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazil coup plot film imagines Bolsonaro takeover
item.description: New film envisions alternate history where Bolsonaro's coup succeeds with US backing, highlighting threats to Indigenous peoples and Amazon.

item.title: 🌍 Trump ally Roger Stone lobbying for Myanmar's military junta
item.description: Roger Stone faces criticism for accepting $50,000 monthly to lobby for Myanmar's military-backed government.
